# String Greater Equal

String greater than or equal comparison

```perl
$greater_eq = $left ge $right;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$greater_eq = $left ge $right;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$greater_eq = $left ge $right;
```
